message:
feat: add proper text field editing using bubbles textinput component

Implements professional text editing for container image configuration:

Text Input Integration:
- Use bubbles textinput.Model for proper text field editing
- Initialize textinput with placeholder and appropriate width
- Enter key switches between view and edit modes for text fields

Text Editing Behavior:
- Navigate to text field and press Enter to start editing
- Full text input capabilities (typing, backspace, cursor movement)
- Enter again to save changes and exit edit mode
- textinput component handles all editing interactions

Field Rendering:
- Show textinput.View() when actively editing
- Show styled text value when not editing
- Smooth transition between display and edit modes
- Maintains fixed-width layout for stable alignment

Navigation:
- ↑/↓ navigation disabled while editing text (textinput handles keys)
- Enter exits editing and saves value to field
- Esc or 'q' can cancel editing (handled by textinput)

Benefits:
- ✅ Professional text editing with cursor, selection, etc.
- ✅ Container Image field now fully editable
- ✅ Standard bubbles component - well-tested and feature-rich
- ✅ Proper keyboard handling for text input
- ✅ Maintains layout stability during editing

Now users can edit the Container Image field to use any custom container!

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
